# Cartograph Prompt

Scan the repository and generate a concise one-page `docs/CODEBASE_MAP.md` which includes:

1. Architecture summary (3-6 sentences).
2. Top-level file/folder list with one-line descriptions.
3. Key entry points and how to run locally (quick commands).
4. Important files to inspect and recommended next steps.

Constraints: Use only repository files; do not call external services or modify source code.
